summary: All 25 backend tests pass (SQL guard validation tests). However, overall backend coverage is only 13% (138 of 159 statements missed). Most application modules (config, database, main, models, schemas) have 0% coverage. text_to_sql.py has 64% coverage. No frontend tests are configured. Coverage is well below the 80% minimum threshold.

findings.title: Backend coverage critically low at 13%
findings.detail: Overall backend coverage is 13%, far below the 80% target. Only text_to_sql.py has meaningful test coverage (64%). All other modules (config, database, main, models, schemas) are at 0% coverage.
findings.fix: Add integration tests for API endpoints (main.py), model definitions, schema validation, and database session management. Prioritize main.py endpoint tests as they exercise the full request/response path.

findings.title: No frontend test suite configured
findings.detail: No test script found in frontend/package.json. Frontend code has zero test coverage.
findings.fix: Add a test framework (e.g., Vitest or Jest) and at minimum test the API client (lib/api.ts) and component interactions.
